text_block_list.text:
It's time for the latest Fan Fest, an event
featuring various attractions for the fans who
support Tracen's students.

On opening day, I see Tokai Teio looking very
enthusiastic.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to the Fan Fest! We hope you enjoy
yourselves to your heart and soul's content!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, hello, Trainer! I hope you're having a most
pleasant experience!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Can't you tell? I'm talking like Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
'Cause today the student council are all up to
their heads in stuff to do! They said they're
desperate for help!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Prez even told me straight up that she needed me
to help out!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So I'm her stand-in! Do you even understand how
big this is?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Wait, wait!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, once I started helping out, I
realized this was way more than I bargained for.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So by the powers vested in me, the current Prez, I
command you to help too!

Per her wishes, I end up tagging alongside Tokai
Teio while she walks around the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Dang! That line is huge!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, our beef stew and skewer set is a way
bigger hit than we expected.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ooh, that sounds delicious!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...I mean. Ahem. Understood. Us members of the
student council shall come to your aid.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uh... Who are you?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I give up...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What's wrong, Hayahide?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm in the middle of the scavenger hunt and I need
to find someone who can do a hundred sit-ups.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Us members of the student council shall
come to your aid. You're up, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Undertake this task and do the school proud!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Is this some kind of skit?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Good, good. It's a pleasure to see everyone
enjoying themselves. You've been a great help
too, Trainer!
choice_data_list: You took this pretty seriously, Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! "Pretty seriously"? How rude!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Not only is Prez amazing at running, she's a
top-notch student council president too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And I'm her stand-in! Of course I would approach
such an important duty with the utmost
seriousness!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Huh? Everyone's headed toward the stage for
some reason. Let's check it out.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, it says "Shining Umadol Contest"! I bet
there'll be lots of singing and dancing!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sniff... What am I going to do?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, well. What seems to be the problem, young
Falco?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Teio... I was gonna join the contest, but...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
My friend who was supposed to be my entry
partner told me she couldn't do it all of a sudden!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I tried to tell her we'd be fine 'cause I'm cute
enough for the both of us, but she wouldn't even
listen...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... I see, I see...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
This sounds like a job for the student council! All
right, I'll join you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: R-really?! Thanks, Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I am not Teio... I am (the stand-in for)
Symboli Rudolf!

In this way, the stand-in Symboli Rudolf formerly
known as Tokai Teio goes around solving various
issues as they crop up.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you for your hard work today, Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehehe. I took my job as your stand-in very, very seriously!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Indeed... I've heard many words of gratitude from
everyone. You've been quite busy, it seems.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Which brings me to my next point...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I've been hearing a lot of cries for the winners of
a certain Umadol contest to put on an encore
performance.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And to my surprise, my name seems to be listed
as one of the unit's members...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah... Well, that's because...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And just a little while ago, someone handed me a
very frilly idol costume...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ah, haha... Well, I mean... you could pull off any
kind of look so...

Tokai Teio gets a scolding and is told to never
steal someone else's name again.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
By the way, do you have any idea why my name
was listed among the winners of a certain
contest?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, crap... Err, you must mean that Umadol
thingy I entered...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you'd falsely assume my name like
that.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In any case, all the fans I've talked to seemed
deeply impressed by the performance.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...The performance of Smart Falcon and Tokai
Teio, that is.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: They're clamoring for an encore. Make sure you give them your real name this time.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Okay, I will! I'll make sure they see Tokai
Teio in all of her glory!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
My fans are waiting out there! This must be the
start of my Umadol career!

Thanks to Tokai Teio's support, the Fan Fest ends
in a roaring success.
